blockers.title: No command palette UI exists
blockers.detail: showPalette() at command.tsx:357 calls run('file.open', 'palette') which opens the file dialog. There is no searchable list of all commands. The entire palette component must be built from scratch.

blockers.title: Dirty work must be resolved
blockers.detail: key-hint-overlay.tsx is untracked 250-line WIP. layout.tsx has 37 uncommitted lines wiring modifier-hold detection. Palette expansion must adopt or reconcile this work.

architecture.provider_chain: CommandProvider wraps app via createSimpleContext. useCommand() hook provides: bind(), run(), register(), showPalette(). Layout.tsx calls useCommand() for palette trigger.
architecture.dispatch_pipeline: KeyboardEvent → handleKeyDown → matchKeybind → run(id, source) → command.onSelect()
architecture.catalog_persistence: catalog() computed from all register() calls. Persisted via Persist utility in user settings for keybind overrides.

existing_filtering.useFilteredList: Available from @opencode-ai/ui/hooks — uses fuzzysort + keyboard nav. Async via createResource.
existing_filtering.list_search_component: Higher-level wrapper above useFilteredList. Used in dialog-manage-agents, dialog-select-model. Includes search bar, grouping, empty states.
existing_filtering.direct_fuzzysort_usage: Used in settings-keybinds for inline filtering

plugin_extension_points.note: Plugins could register commands via useCommand().register(). The SlashCommand.source field shows the seam exists.

keybind_system.pipeline: parseKeybind(config) → Keybind[] → matchKeybind() for dispatch → formatKeybind() for display
keybind_system.overrides: Persisted via user settings, merged with defaults
keybind_system.no_keyboard_nav_infrastructure: Arrow-key navigation through search results, active selection state, keyboard-only flow must be built from scratch

deferred_seams: Keyboard-only navigation infrastructure (arrow keys, active selection, enter to confirm)
Plugin-contributed command registration endpoint from plugin sandbox API
Command search debounce / rate limiting for large catalogs
